mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, user_id, name, key_prefix, lookup_hash, lookup_hash_version, enabled, expire_at, last_used_at, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at FROM api_key WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM api_key k INNER JOIN user_account u ON u.id = k.user_id WHERE k.deleted_at IS NULL AND k.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND k.user_id = #{userId}
AND (k.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR k.key_prefix ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.username ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.display_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND k.enabled = TRUE AND (k.expire_at IS NULL OR k.expire_at > NOW())
AND k.enabled = FALSE AND (k.expire_at IS NULL OR k.expire_at > NOW())
AND k.expire_at IS NOT NULL AND k.expire_at <= NOW()

SELECT k.id AS id, k.tenant_id AS tenantId, t.tenant_code AS tenantCode, t.name AS tenantName, k.user_id AS userId, u.username AS username, u.display_name AS userDisplayName, k.name AS name, k.key_prefix AS keyPrefix, k.enabled AS enabled, k.expire_at AS expireAt, k.last_used_at AS lastUsedAt, k.created_at AS createdAt, k.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM api_key k INNER JOIN user_account u ON u.id = k.user_id INNER JOIN tenant t ON t.id = k.tenant_id WHERE k.id = #{id} AND k.deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO api_key (tenant_id, user_id, name, key_prefix, lookup_hash, lookup_hash_version, enabled, expire_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{userId}, #{name}, #{keyPrefix}, #{lookupHash}, #{lookupHashVersion}, #{enabled}, #{expireAt}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE api_key SET name = #{name}, expire_at = NULL #{expireAt} , updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE api_key SET enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE api_key SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE k.deleted_at IS NULL) AS total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE k.deleted_at IS NULL AND k.enabled = TRUE AND (k.expire_at IS NULL OR k.expire_at > NOW())) AS enabled, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE k.deleted_at IS NULL AND k.enabled = FALSE AND (k.expire_at IS NULL OR k.expire_at > NOW())) AS disabled, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE k.deleted_at IS NULL AND k.expire_at IS NOT NULL AND k.expire_at <= NOW()) AS expired, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE k.deleted_at IS NULL AND k.enabled = TRUE AND k.expire_at IS NOT NULL AND k.expire_at > NOW() AND k.expire_at <= NOW() + (#{expiringWithinDays} || ' days')::interval) AS expiring_soon FROM api_key k WHERE 1 = 1 AND k.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND k.user_id = #{userId}
